query: SELECT contract_no, amount, method, paid_at, receipt_no, created_by, raw_json FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND (raw_json->>'$.remark' LIKE '%ปิด%' OR raw_json->>'$.close_installment_amount' > 0 AND raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' = 0) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT contract_no, amount, method, paid_at, receipt_no, created_by, raw_json FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND (raw_json->>'$.remark' LIKE '%ปิด%' OR raw_json->>'$.close_installment_amount' > 0 AND raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' = 0) LIMIT 5;
